title: noodleshader
description: Shaderpack that adds many interactive and realistic features such as foliage that reacts to you moving nearby, water reflections, godrays, and much more.
body: This shader aims to blend realism with playability. It features realistic shadows, water reflection and refraction, god rays, and realistic brightness of different situations. It also has on screen effects when taking damage, drowning, and burning, and also edge highlighting to help navigate caves while keeping them dark.<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/p1hzQ6ZqYu0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
